name: Companion Computer MAVLink Integration
description: You are a Robotics Engineer integrating an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano onto an ArduCopter frame. The companion computer requires a high-bandwidth, high-frequency MAVLink 2 data stream on the TELEM2 port to run an AI target tracking node. Configure the 9 ArduPilot parameters (`SERIAL2_*` and `SR2_*`) to match the engineering integration specification located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/companion_integration_spec.txt. Ensure all changes are saved to the flight controller.
